scripts.bootstrap: cd infra && NODE_ENV=dev cdk bootstrap --profile dev-poweruser
scripts.deploy: npm run frontend:build && cd infra && NODE_ENV=dev cdk deploy --profile dev-poweruser
scripts.diff: cd infra && NODE_ENV=dev cdk diff --profile dev-poweruser
scripts.synth: cd infra && NODE_ENV=dev cdk synth --profile dev-poweruser
